# CWE-208 positive: early return on failed secret compare
lang: go
file: CWE-208-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-208 Observable Timing Discrepancy
// Vulnerable line: returns immediately when bytes differ.
func CheckResetToken(c *gin.Context, expected []byte) {
	provided := []byte(c.PostForm("token"))
	if len(provided) != len(expected) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
		return
	}
	for i := range expected {
		if provided[i] != expected[i] {
			c.JSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "denied"})
			return
		}
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"status": "ok"})
}
